title: Business Development Sales Blueprint and Dashboards
problemStatement: Inconsistent sales stages and weak forecasting reduced predictability and made resource planning harder.
solution: Defined a standardized sales lifecycle, introduced role-based handoffs, and built dashboards for funnel health and weighted forecasting through the Zoho stack.
impact: Improved pipeline visibility, shortened the sales cycle by around 20 percent, and strengthened coordination between business development and technical teams.
leadershipValue: Created clearer commercial discipline by connecting stage definitions, forecasting logic, and handoff ownership into a shared operating rhythm.

interactionFiles.label: Interactive case brief
interactionFiles.description: Review the commercial process redesign and the dashboard logic behind forecasting visibility.
